title: state.json
description: Mission state, updated after every transition. Cross-checked against checkpoint.json on orchestrator resume.

orchRouting.description: The orchestrator's clawborrator routing name (without leading @).

currentWave.description: 1-indexed wave number during phase 3. Null outside phase 3.

currentWaveModules.description: Module ids spawned in the current wave but not yet handed off.

respawns.description: Map of {worker-key: respawn-count}. worker-key is '<role>:<module-id-or-tag>'. Used to enforce max-3-respawns.
